vllm.title: [Model] Add Mistral Tokenization to improve robustness and chat encoding
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add official MistralTokenizer
The official mistral models (from https://huggingface.co/mistralai) are not fully tested with HF tokenizers and
we it tends to happen that there are encoding / decoder and especially chat encoding problems.
Mistral models are only fully tested with https://github.com/mi

vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Expands weight loading to support grouped and per channel weight quantization. Cleans-up fp8 MoE to use the updated weight loading
Adds Marlin Fused MoE Kernel for w4a16 by @ElizaWszola
Adds CompressedTensorsMoEMethod to support MoE w4a16 models from llm-compressor and compressed-tensors

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Allow ScalarType to be compiled with pytorch 2.3 and add checks for registering FakeScalarType and dynamo support.
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
ScalarType won't compile and FakeScalarType cannot be registered if the Pytorch version is < 2.4.0.  So we disable the _core_C extension under these circumstances.
cc @youkaichao , @SageMoore , @LucasWilkinson , @gshtras , @mgoin , @tlrmchlsmth

vllm.title: [mypy][CI/Build] Fix mypy errors
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Merging #7229 caused some mypy errors in CI even though the PR itself passed the check. This PR fixes the newly appearing errors.
